TYPE · TO · DO · ANYTHING
Why Clicks

Your phone, minus the icon maze.

Every launcher gives you grids to swipe and folders to hunt through. Clicks gives you a cursor. It’s faster, it’s calmer, and it learns — where you are, what you open, how you type — without any of it leaving your phone.

⌨️

Type-first

Search apps, people, the web, math and settings from one bar. GO does the obvious thing.

🧭

Context-aware

Spaces re-arrange your apps by time, place, driving and meetings — automatically.

🔒

Private

Your habits, places and typing model stay on-device. Prediction weights are encrypted at rest.

💎

Premium feel

Dark glass design, neumorphic keycaps, live weather and contextual widgets.

The home screen

A home screen that shows only what matters.

No pages of icons. Clicks centers your day: weather up top, a live widget stack in the middle, your five favorites in the dock, and the keyboard right where your thumbs are.

Live weather header — temperature, feels-like, humidity and wind, animated to the conditions.

Contextual widget stack — now-playing, calendar, recent people, email, news and driving context appear only when they’re useful. Pin, auto or hide each one.

Favorites dock — your five most-used apps, always one tap away.

Two keyboard modes — dock it below the home screen, or float it as a home-screen widget.

Type-to-do

One bar. It searches everything at once.

Start typing and Clicks ranks apps, contacts, the web, quick math, live markets and your own launcher settings together. Tap a result, or press GO for the obvious action.

maps→Open Google Maps
theverge.com→Open the site (not a search)
mara→Message a contact
45 * 1.2→= 54
aapl stock→Live quote
bitcoin price→Live price
eur to usd→Convert currency
accent→Change your launcher, live

Type-to-customize — settings are just search results

type glass type dark type accent type icon pack type haptics type widgets
App library

Every app, organized the way you think.

When you do want to browse, the library is clean and yours to shape — built from your real installed apps, never a hard-coded list.

Grid, category & bento views — see everything, or group by what apps are for.

Icon packs & per-app overrides — make it match your wallpaper down to a single icon.

Long-press actions — add or remove dock favorites, hide apps, jump to app shortcuts.

Search finds real names — results use the app’s name, never a technical package ID.

The flagship feature

Spaces — your phone rearranges itself around your day.

A Space is a context: Work, Driving, Commute, Home. Tell Clicks what triggers each one, and your apps quietly re-rank to fit the moment you’re in. It even learns your places on its own — and every bit of it stays on your phone.

Triggers — mix and match

🕘Time of day 📅Weekdays / weekends 📍Home · Work · Gym · Airport 🚗Driving speed 🔊Car Bluetooth 🎧Headphones 🗓️In a meeting

Auto-switch — a Space activates the moment its triggers match; the one with the most matches wins.

Pinned & preferred — lead each Space with the apps and categories you choose, then let it learn the rest.

Learns per Space — every Space builds its own ranking from what you actually open there.

Learns your places — “Was that an airport?” Tap yes and Clicks saves the spot — stored on this phone only.

The keyboard

A keyboard worth typing on — because you’ll live in it.

The same input engine powers search and everyday typing. It’s fast, tactile, and it learns your style locally.

On-device prediction & autocorrect — learns your words with an n-gram model; nothing is uploaded.

Glide / swipe typing — an original, on-device neural swipe model — no cloud round-trip.

Four themes — default, Teclas, GoKeys, and the premium Skeuo keycaps.

Made to feel physical — haptics, long-press symbols, flick input, and space-bar cursor control.

default teclas gokeys skeuo pro
🎵

Music, built in

Control whatever’s playing from the home screen, with several now-playing looks. Connect Spotify for your full library and the deluxe click-wheel (Pro).

📷

Photos, built in

Browse recent shots, albums and favorites, delete-to-trash and view full-screen — without leaving the launcher.

🔗

Native integrations

Contacts, calendar, weather, notifications, media and installed apps — Clicks reads your phone, not a cloud copy of it.

Private by design

The smartest part of Clicks never leaves your phone.

Your typing model, your app habits and your learned places are all stored on-device — prediction weights are even encrypted at rest. The only data that leaves is to services you choose to connect: weather, Spotify, Gemini, or Gmail for boarding passes.

on-device prediction encrypted weights no ad SDKs you connect the rest
Free vs Pro

The whole launcher is free. Pro makes it brilliant.

Everything that makes Clicks Clicks — typing to launch, Spaces, the widget stack, on-device prediction and glide typing — is free forever. Pro is a one-time unlock for the AI and power features.

Clicks Pro

Pay once. Own the fastest phone you’ve had.

Pro turns Clicks from a beautiful launcher into an assistant that writes with you, plays your whole library, and meets you at the airport. One purchase, no subscription, and every feature we add next is already yours.

AI

Gemini writes with you

Full-context suggestions and smart compose in the keyboard, plus AI chat from your home screen. Your words, finished faster.

Music

Your whole library

Connect Spotify for full library and search, and the deluxe now-playing click-wheel — not just basic controls.

Travel

Boarding passes, ready

Flights and boarding passes surface automatically when you travel, so the right card is waiting when you land.

Craft

The Skeuo keyboard

Deep, tactile keycaps that make every message feel good to type. The keyboard enthusiasts ask for.

Forever

All future Pro features

Buy once and every Pro feature we ship next lands in your app at no extra cost.

Fair

Restore anytime

Tied to your Google account. New phone? Restore your purchase in a tap. No login, no subscription, no lock-in.

One-time Unlock Pro
No subscription · restore on any device · try every free feature first
Paste-ready

Your Play Store listing, written and counted.

Copy straight into the Play Console. Character limits are pre-checked.

Clicks: Type-First Launcher
Short description79 / 80
Type to search, launch & do anything. A fast, private, keyboard-first launcher.
Full description≈ 2,400 / 4,000
Clicks is a home screen built around one idea: you already know what you want, so just type it.

No more hunting through pages of icons. Open Clicks, start typing, and the right thing is already there — an app, a contact, a calendar event, a song, a website, a quick calculation, or a setting. One keyboard runs your whole phone.

━━━ TYPE TO DO ANYTHING ━━━
The keyboard is the launcher. Start typing and Clicks searches everything at once:
• Apps — by name, instantly, ranked by how you actually use them
• Contacts — call, message, or open a chat in one tap
• The web — type "theverge.com" and GO opens the site, not a search about it
• Math — "45*1.2" answers inline
• Markets — "aapl stock", "bitcoin price", "eur to usd"
• Settings — type "glass", "accent", "dark", "haptics" or "icon pack" to change your launcher live, no menus

━━━ A HOME SCREEN THAT MAKES SENSE ━━━
• Live weather header — temperature, feels-like, humidity and wind
• A centered, contextual widget stack — music, calendar, recent people, email, news and driving context appear only when they matter
• A clean favorites dock for your five most-used apps
• A dark, premium, glass design — no icon clutter

━━━ SPACES — YOUR PHONE, BY CONTEXT ━━━
Create Spaces like Work, Driving, Commute or Home and set what triggers them — time of day, day of week, a place, driving speed, car Bluetooth, headphones, or a calendar meeting. When a Space is active, your apps re-rank to fit the moment. It even learns your places on its own — and all of it stays on your phone.

━━━ A KEYBOARD WORTH TYPING ON ━━━
• On-device prediction and autocorrect that learns your style
• Glide/swipe typing powered by an original, on-device neural model
• Themes — default, Teclas, GoKeys and the premium Skeuo keycaps
• Haptics, long-press symbols, flick input and space-cursor control
• Dock it below your home screen or float it as a widget
• Six languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, French, German

━━━ MUSIC & PHOTOS, BUILT IN ━━━
• Control whatever's playing from the home screen
• Browse recent photos, albums and favorites without leaving the launcher

━━━ PRIVATE BY DESIGN ━━━
Your typing model, app habits and learned places never leave your phone — prediction weights are even encrypted at rest. The only data that leaves is to services you choose to connect (weather, Spotify, Gemini).

━━━ FREE — AND YOURS TO KEEP ━━━
The full launcher is free: type-to-search, type-to-do, Spaces, the widget stack, the app library, weather, music controls, photos, on-device prediction and glide typing, and three keyboard themes.

━━━ CLICKS PRO — ONE-TIME UNLOCK ━━━
Pay once, own it forever. No subscription. Pro adds:
• Gemini AI keyboard — full-context suggestions and smart compose
• AI chat, right from your home screen
• Full Spotify library and search, with the deluxe click-wheel
• Flights & boarding passes surfaced automatically when you travel
• The premium Skeuo keyboard theme
• Every future Pro feature, included

Download Clicks, start typing, and run your phone at the speed of thought.

Screenshot kit

Real screenshots, ready to upload.

Play needs 2–8 phone screenshots (min side ≥ 320px). These are captured from the live launcher and sit in /screenshots at full resolution. Suggested order & captions below.

“Type. Launch. Done.”

“Only what matters, right now.”

“Every app, your way.”

“Your phone, by context.”

“It learns your places.”

“Music, built in.”

“Tune every Space.”

Before you upload — launch checklist
01

Rename to Clicks. Set app_name in strings.xml to “Clicks” so the installed label matches the listing.

02

Remove READ_SMS. Play restricts it to default-SMS apps; gate SMS seeding behind a non-Play flavor or drop it.

03

Create an upload key. Enroll in Play App Signing — never ship the committed debug key.

04

Declare the Accessibility service. Justify InputInjectionService as core function, or ship the beta with it flagged off.

05

Gmail scopes. Boarding-pass parsing uses restricted Gmail scopes — stay ≤100 testers in testing mode for closed beta.

06

Make the real Pro product. Replace placeholder com.fran.teclas.pro with the Play Console product; add a privacy-policy URL and complete the Data safety form.

Clicks

Marketing presentation & Play Store listing kit. Screenshots are real captures from the launcher (package com.fran.teclas). Copy and character counts are ready for the Play Console; complete the launch checklist before your first upload.
